title: Mistake Explanation Engine

explanation_types.description: The learner likely did not know or recall the concept.
The learner answered a nearby but different question.
The learner selected a tempting but unsupported answer.
The learner likely knew the method but made an execution mistake.
The learner may have rushed because of pacing pressure.

coach_rules: Prefer one likely explanation, not a long list of guesses.
Tie the explanation to evidence such as answer choice patterns, timing, and confidence.
Follow each explanation with one concrete next-step suggestion.
